9: import com.github.javaparser.printer.lexicalpreservation.LexicalPreservingPrinter;
10: 
11: import java.io.IOException;
12: import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
13: import java.nio.file.Files;
14: import java.nio.file.Path;
15: import java.nio.file.Paths;
16: import java.util.Comparator;
17: import java.util.Optional;
18: import java.util.stream.Stream;
19: 
20: public class Main {
21: 
22:     private static final String OLD_TYPE = "com.github.javaparser.printer.PrettyPrinterConfiguration";
23:     private static final String NEW_TYPE = "com.github.javaparser.printer.configuration.PrettyPrinterConfiguration";
24: 
25:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
26:         if (args.length != 1) {
27:             throw new IllegalArgumentException("Expected one argument: the source directory to rewrite");
28:         }
29: 
30:         Path sourceRoot = Paths.get(args[0]);
31:         if (!Files.isDirectory(sourceRoot)) {
32:             throw new IllegalArgumentException("Not a directory: " + sourceRoot);
33:         }
34: 
35:         try (Stream<Path> files = Files.walk(sourceRoot)) {
36:             files.filter(path -> Files.isRegularFile(path) && path.toString().endsWith(".java"))
37:                     .forEach(Main::rewriteFile);
38:         }
39:     }
40: 
41:     private static void rewriteFile(Path file) {
42:         try {
43:             CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(file);
44:             LexicalPreservingPrinter.setup(cu);
45: 
46:             boolean changed = rewriteImports(cu) | rewriteTypeReferences(cu);
47:             if (changed) {
48:                 Files.writeString(file, LexicalPreservingPrinter.print(cu), StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
49:             }
50:         } catch (Exception ignored) {
51:             // Skip files that cannot be parsed; the rule is intended to be applied broadly.
52:         }
53:     }
54: 
55:     private static boolean rewriteImports(CompilationUnit cu) {
56:         boolean changed = false;
57:         for (ImportDeclaration importDeclaration : cu.findAll(ImportDeclaration.class)) {
58:             if (importDeclaration.getNameAsString().equals(OLD_TYPE)) {
59:                 importDeclaration.setName(NEW_TYPE);
60:                 changed = true;
61:             }
62:         }
63:         return changed;
64:     }
65: 
66:     private static boolean rewriteTypeReferences(CompilationUnit cu) {
67:         boolean changed = false;
68:         for (ClassOrInterfaceType type : cu.findAll(ClassOrInterfaceType.class)) {
69:             if (OLD_TYPE.equals(qualifiedName(type))) {
70:                 type.replace(StaticJavaParser.parseClassOrInterfaceType(NEW_TYPE));
71:                 changed = true;
72:             }
73:         }
74:         return changed;
75:     }
76: 
77:     private static String qualifiedName(ClassOrInterfaceType type) {
78:         StringBuilder builder = new StringBuilder(type.getNameAsString());
79:         Optional<ClassOrInterfaceType> scope = type.getScope();
80:         while (scope.isPresent()) {
81:             builder.insert(0, scope.get().getNameAsString() + ".");
82:             scope = scope.get().getScope();
83:         }
84:         return builder.toString();
85:     }
86: }
